FAQ

FindLost is a search engine designed to help users discover missed airdrops and staking positions associated with their cryptocurrency wallets.

FindLost scans various blockchain networks and protocols to identify any unclaimed rewards or airdrops associated with the wallet address you provide. It then presents this information in an easy-to-understand format.

Yes, FindLost is designed with security in mind. We only require your public wallet address, which is already visible on the blockchain. We never ask for or store private keys or sensitive information.

FindLost can discover various types of unclaimed rewards, including airdrops from blockchain projects, unclaimed staking rewards, governance tokens, and other protocol-specific rewards you might have missed.

We can't give a definitive answer to this question. It depends on which airdrops you have already claimed, the actions and operations you have performed with your wallet, and whether you meet the conditions for various airdrops.

We use cookies to provide you with the best experience on our website. Please refer to our Cookie Policy for more information.
